name: Luncheon Turkey Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix the plain yogurt and low calorie mayonnaise until well combined.
2. Add the curry powder, lemon juice, diced turkey breast, grated carrot, and diced celery to the bowl. Stir gently until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Fold in the seedless grapes, halved.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving to allow flavors to meld together.
Ensure the salad is well-chilled before serving.
